---
title: "Skills"
page-layout: full
---

## Core Technical Skills

::: {.skills-grid}
`R` `SAS` `SQL` `Stan` `Python (basic-intermediate)` `Bayesian Modeling` `Generalized Linear Mixed Models (GLMM)` `Experimental & Clinical Trial Design` `Statistical Consulting` `Data Wrangling & Cleaning` `Reproducible Reporting (Quarto/R Markdown)`
:::

## Specializations

#### Clinical Trials Operations Specialization
**Johns Hopkins University** — Coursera · [<small>view specialization certificate</small>](https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/specialization/2FI5D06DC5R7){target="_blank"}

Four-course specialization covering clinical trial design, operations management, data management & quality assurance, and results analysis/presentation.
[View credentials →](/certifications.qmd#clinical-trials)

#### Google Data Analytics Specialization
**Google** — Coursera *(in progress)*

Covers the full data analysis lifecycle — from data cleaning and preparation to exploration and data-driven decision-making.
[View credentials →](/certifications.qmd#google-data-analytics)

#### SQL Fundamentals
**DataCamp** *(in progress)*

Skill track covering SQL querying, joins, and intermediate query techniques across relational databases.
[View credentials →](/certifications.qmd#sql-fundamentals)

---

For a complete, detailed list of all courses and verification links, see the [full certification history](/certifications.qmd).
